Interface ClientUtilitiesFunction

public interface ClientUtilitiesFunction
Logging utilities for the Mesos client. All methods write timestamped entries to client.log; output is silently dropped if the log has not been initialised.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    LOG_FILE
    Path of the client log file.
    static final String
    LOG_PREFIX
    Log tag prepended to all messages written by this utility.
    static final AtomicReference<PrintWriter>
    LOG_WRITER
    Shared reference to the active log writer; null until initLog() is called.
    static final int
    RMI_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS
    RMI call timeout in milliseconds; RMI calls are aborted if no response arrives within this window.
    static final int
    SOCKET_TIMEOUT_MS
    Socket read timeout in milliseconds; sockets are closed if the server is silent this long.
    static final DateTimeFormatter
    TIMESTAMP_FMT
    Timestamp format used in every log entry.

  • Method Summary

    Static Methods
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    initLog()
    Opens (or truncates) the client log file.
    static void
    logError(String message)
    Writes an error-level entry using the default LOG_PREFIX.
    static void
    logError(String prefix, String message)
    Writes an error-level entry to the log.
    static void
    logInfo(String prefix, String message)
    Writes an info-level entry to the log.

      static final int SOCKET_TIMEOUT_MS
      Socket read timeout in milliseconds; sockets are closed if the server is silent this long.

      Shared reference to the active log writer; null until initLog() is called.

  • Method Details

    • initLog

      static void initLog()
      Opens (or truncates) the client log file. Must be called once before any logging.

    • logInfo

      static void logInfo(String prefix, String message)
      Writes an info-level entry to the log.
      Parameters:
      prefix - log tag identifying the caller (e.g. "[CLIENT][TUI]").
      message - the message to log.

    • logError

      static void logError(String prefix, String message)
      Writes an error-level entry to the log.
      Parameters:
      prefix - log tag identifying the caller.
      message - the error message to log.

    • logError

      static void logError(String message)
      Writes an error-level entry using the default LOG_PREFIX.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message to log.
